## pgbackrest_cloud.conf

```ini
# Generated by postgres-operator. DO NOT EDIT.
# Your changes will not be saved.

[global]
archive-async = y
compress-level = 3
compress-type = lz4
log-level-file = off
process-max = 8
repo1-cipher-type = aes-256-cbc
repo1-path = /pgbackrest/repo1
repo1-retention-diff = 7
repo1-retention-full = 4
repo1-retention-full-type = count
repo1-s3-bucket = pgbackrest-uae-prod-609d40f1-26e9-4616-9021-3135255d453e
repo1-s3-endpoint = s3-openshift-storage.apps.ocp-prod.habibbank.local
repo1-s3-region = prod
repo1-s3-uri-style = path
repo1-s3-verify-tls = n
repo1-type = s3
spool-path = /pgdata/pgbackrest-spool

[db]
pg1-host = prod-pgcluster-uae-dc1-5c2q-0.prod-pgcluster-uae-pods.prod-pgcluster-uae.svc.cluster.local.
pg1-host-ca-file = /etc/pgbackrest/conf.d/~postgres-operator/tls-ca.crt
pg1-host-cert-file = /etc/pgbackrest/conf.d/~postgres-operator/client-tls.crt
pg1-host-key-file = /etc/pgbackrest/conf.d/~postgres-operator/client-tls.key
pg1-host-type = tls
pg1-path = /pgdata/pg18
pg1-port = 5555
pg1-socket-path = /tmp/postgres
pg2-host = prod-pgcluster-uae-dc1-9c5j-0.prod-pgcluster-uae-pods.prod-pgcluster-uae.svc.cluster.local.
pg2-host-ca-file = /etc/pgbackrest/conf.d/~postgres-operator/tls-ca.crt
pg2-host-cert-file = /etc/pgbackrest/conf.d/~postgres-operator/client-tls.crt
pg2-host-key-file = /etc/pgbackrest/conf.d/~postgres-operator/client-tls.key
pg2-host-type = tls
pg2-path = /pgdata/pg18
pg2-port = 5555
pg2-socket-path = /tmp/postgres
```

## pgbackrest_instance.conf

```ini
# Generated by postgres-operator. DO NOT EDIT.
# Your changes will not be saved.

[global]
archive-async = y
compress-level = 3
compress-type = lz4
log-path = /pgdata/pgbackrest/log
process-max = 8
repo1-cipher-type = aes-256-cbc
repo1-path = /pgbackrest/repo1
repo1-retention-diff = 7
repo1-retention-full = 4
repo1-retention-full-type = count
repo1-s3-bucket = pgbackrest-uae-prod-609d40f1-26e9-4616-9021-3135255d453e
repo1-s3-endpoint = s3-openshift-storage.apps.ocp-prod.habibbank.local
repo1-s3-region = prod
repo1-s3-uri-style = path
repo1-s3-verify-tls = n
repo1-type = s3
spool-path = /pgdata/pgbackrest-spool

[db]
pg1-path = /pgdata/pg18
pg1-port = 5555
pg1-socket-path = /tmp/postgres
```

## pgbackrest_server.conf

```ini
# Generated by postgres-operator. DO NOT EDIT.
# Your changes will not be saved.

[global]
tls-server-address = 0.0.0.0
tls-server-auth = pgbackrest@d761d71b-72de-41a1-bd1e-84bedf2c254a=*
tls-server-ca-file = /etc/pgbackrest/conf.d/~postgres-operator/tls-ca.crt
tls-server-cert-file = /etc/pgbackrest/server/server-tls.crt
tls-server-key-file = /etc/pgbackrest/server/server-tls.key

[global:server]
log-level-console = detail
log-level-file = off
log-level-stderr = error
log-timestamp = n
```
